title: OMNI-VIEW Trace Bundle
description: Defines the required shape of a trace bundle exported by OMNI-VIEW for ingestion into 10-Construction_OS. Fail-closed: any missing or invalid field causes rejection.

trace_id.description: Unique identifier for the trace, assigned by OMNI-VIEW.

source_tool.description: Name of the tool that produced this trace (e.g. OMNI-VIEW).

source_file_ref.description: Optional reference to the source architect drawing file.

trace_type.description: Type of traced boundary. Must be FOUNDATION_OUTLINE or WALL_CENTERLINE.

units.description: Unit of measurement for polyline coordinates (e.g. ft, m).

ppu.description: Pixels per unit used during trace calibration.

calibration.description: Calibration metadata. Must include at least ppu and unit.

polyline_points.description: Array of polyline vertices. Must contain at least 3 points.

closed_status.description: Must be true. Only closed polylines are admissible.

operator_confirmed.description: Must be true. Operator must confirm trace accuracy before export.

$comment: AUTHORITY BOUNDARY: This schema defines the ingestion contract for OMNI-VIEW trace bundles. Construction_OS validates all bundles against this schema before admitting any boundary. Fail-closed semantics apply throughout.
